elicitation_yield.caption: Number of emotions (of 171) by how many usable messages the elicitation loop produced before stopping; the cap is 20 messages per emotion.
elicitation_yield.takeaway: Yield varies by emotion and the variation is informative: 17 of 171 emotions reach the 20-message cap, most stop earlier with a stated reason, and 11 yield nothing — the empirical equivalent of a triage skip. The loop produced 1,972 usable messages in total.
